statements.impact_statement: csi-resizer does not link golang.org/x/text/language (the BCP-47 language-tag parser); pclntab (-s -w stripped, nm=0) has no golang.org/x/text/language symbols at golang.org/x/text v0.3.5. Vulnerable code not present.

csi-resizer does not link gopkg.in/yaml.v3 (the YAML v3 decoder); pclntab (-s -w stripped, nm=0) has no gopkg.in/yaml.v3 symbols at gopkg.in/yaml.v3 v3.0.0-20210107192922-496545a6307b. Vulnerable code not present.

csi-resizer does not link golang.org/x/text/language (the BCP-47 language-tag parser); pclntab (-s -w stripped, nm=0) has no golang.org/x/text/language symbols at golang.org/x/text v0.3.5. Vulnerable code not present.
CVE-2023-45289 affects HTTP cookie forwarding on redirects; csi-resizer uses K8s API with Bearer tokens, no HTTP cookies
Govulncheck confirmed not_affected; CSI resizer uses gRPC, no untrusted cookie flows
